sourcesContent:
# Own/guarded/stepped/indexed loops in EXPRESSION position — the
# value-usage lowerings: accumulator IIFEs for value comprehensions,
# inline _result accumulators in tail position.
xs = [1, 2, 3, 4]
obj = {a: 1, b: 2, c: 3}
evens = (x for x in xs when x % 2 == 0)
own1 = (k for own k of obj)
own2 = (names for own names of obj when names != "b")
stepped = (x for x in xs by 2)
steppedDown = (x for x in xs by -1)
steppedGuard = (x for x in xs when x > 1 by 2)
indexed = (x + i for x, i in xs)
tailGuard = (xs) ->
  for x in xs when x > 1
    x * 2
tailIndexed = (xs) ->
  for v, i in xs
    v + i
tailOwn = (m) ->
  for own name, id of m when id >= 2
    name + id
tailStep = (xs) ->
  for v in xs by 2
    v * 10
valueGuard = for v in xs when v != 2
  v + 100
valueOwn = for own k, v of obj when v > 1
  k + v
sink = {}
sink[k] = v for own k, v of obj
sums = []
sums.push(a + b) for [a, b] in [[1, 2], [3, 4]] when a > 0
r1 = tailGuard(xs)
r2 = tailIndexed(xs)
r3 = tailOwn(obj)
r4 = tailStep(xs)
